CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Continued To Apr-24-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment And Dismissal
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rosailda Perez, Deputy Attorney General, 415-510-3506 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' Motion For Entry Of Judgment And Dismissal.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant DMV's motion for entry of judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The court will execute the proposed judgment.

Judgment is signed. (see scanned judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Continued To Feb-27-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rosailda Perez, Deputy Attorney General, 415-510-3506 for DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Defendant California Department of Motor Vehicles' demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jesse Greenberg, 415-668-5239 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Micah C.E. Osgood, Deputy Attorney General, 415-510-3500 of the Office of the Attorney General for Defendant CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Continued to January 8, 2019 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff to file an amended Petition by 12/14/18 and physically bring a copy to Defendant's Counsel at 455 Golden Gate. Response by 12/21/18.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Continued To Dec-04-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jesse Greenberg, T:415.318.9537, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf;
Robert S. Sandoval, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, T:415.510.3856, for defendant/moving party.

RULING: Mr. Greenberg requests that this action be stayed for 6 months. Defendant's counsel objects. The Court does not believe that granting a stay is appropriate at this time. However, to provide special accomodation to plaintiff,

DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' Demurrer To Complaint is CONTINUED to December 4, 2018 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff's opposition is due on 11/19/18; reply is due on 11/27/18. If plaintiff does not file an opposition, Defendant's demurrer will be sustained without leave to amend.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
